results.engine_gap: graveyard target choice + dynamic +1/+1 counters scaling with X + type-becoming (1/1 Spirit creature with flying in addition to existing types)
results.notes: Bespoke reanimation with X counters and a type-changing layer effect. Composable resolves do not cover graveyard targeting or type-becoming.

results.engine_gap: graveyard targeting (return creature card with mana value <= 3 to battlefield tapped)
results.notes: Reanimation requires player-driven graveyard target choice and ETB-tapped flag. Bespoke pattern, not in spell_resolve helpers.

results.engine_gap: discover (LCI mechanic — counter target spell + discover X based on countered spell mana value)
results.notes: Per task instructions, discover is an LCI engine subsystem to leave.

results.engine_gap: type-becoming with base P/T override (target becomes Dinosaur artifact creature 4/3 in addition to other types until end of turn)
results.notes: Layer 4/6 type-changing effect; not modeled by composable resolves.

results.engine_gap: owner-choice ordering (target's owner picks top or bottom of library)
results.notes: Player choice mechanic for library top/bottom; needs interactive prompt + ordered ZONE_CHANGE.

results.notes: Mill auto-pattern works for the first part, but the up-to-two graveyard-to-hand return requires bespoke selection logic.
